name: /plugin-list prints the installed plugins with their id and source repo by default
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example && printf 'plugin_id: example\nsource_repo: acme/example\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example/source.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-list.sh" 2>out.txt && grep -q 'plugin_id=example' out.txt && grep -q 'source_repo=acme/example' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
